title: Electric machine assembly having end frame cooling
abstract: An electric machine assembly includes a shaft configured to rotate about an axis and an end frame coupled about the shaft such that the shaft rotates relative to the end frame. The end frame includes an end surface and a plurality of pins that extend axially from the end surface. The electric machine assembly also includes a fan coupled to the shaft such that rotation of the shaft causes rotation of the fan to facilitate cooling the plurality of pins.
claims: 1. An electric machine assembly comprising: a shaft configured to rotate about an axis; an end frame coupled about said shaft such that said shaft rotates relative to said end frame, wherein said end frame comprises: an end surface; a plurality of pins that extend axially from said end surface; and an extension portion extending axially from said end surface in a direction away from said plurality of pins, said extension portion comprising: a cooling portion including a plurality of fins extending from said extension portion in a radial direction away from the axis; a flange portion; and a seating groove positioned radially between said cooling portion and said flange portion; an O-ring positioned within said seating grove, between said cooling portion and said flange portion, said O-ring wrapped around said cooling portion and said O-ring does not extend circumferentially around said end frame; and a fan coupled to said shaft such that rotation of said shaft causes rotation of said fan to facilitate cooling said plurality of pins.
